p.em: Byte-exact mapping of keys to physical server nodes via virtual partitions.

ol.li: Virtual nodes (vnodes) are hashed using host_id + counter.
Data keys are hashed using the same function.
Ownership is defined as the first vnode encountered clockwise.

div.p: python def get_node(key_hash, ring): # Binary search (bisect_right) on sorted vnode hash list idx = bisect.bisect_right(ring.sorted_hashes, key_hash) if idx == len(ring.sorted_hashes): return ring.nodes[ring.sorted_hashes[0]] # Wrap around return ring.nodes[ring.sorted_hashes[idx]]
